changeSet.author: middleware-core
changeSet.comment: Grant operational permissions to OPERADOR (read+export+print on operational menus)
changeSet.sql: INSERT INTO admin.role_menu_action (keycloak_role_name, menu_id, action_id, is_granted, created_by, created_date) SELECT 'OPERADOR', m.id, a.id, TRUE, 'system', NOW() FROM admin.menu m JOIN admin.action a ON a.code IN ('READ', 'EXPORT', 'PRINT') WHERE m.code IN ( 'DASHBOARD', 'PAGOS', 'TRANSACCIONES', 'TIPO_CAMBIO', 'REPORTES', 'SOBOCE', 'CONCILIACION' ) ON CONFLICT (keycloak_role_name, menu_id, action_id) DO NOTHING;

changeSet.author: middleware-core
changeSet.comment: Grant read-only permissions to AUDITOR (read+export across all active menus)
changeSet.sql: INSERT INTO admin.role_menu_action (keycloak_role_name, menu_id, action_id, is_granted, created_by, created_date) SELECT 'AUDITOR', m.id, a.id, TRUE, 'system', NOW() FROM admin.menu m JOIN admin.action a ON a.code IN ('READ', 'EXPORT') WHERE m.is_active = TRUE ON CONFLICT (keycloak_role_name, menu_id, action_id) DO NOTHING;
